channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 10 com severidade Crítica
• 7 com severidade Alta
• 8 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-42088 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.6
Resumo:
OpenC3 COSMOS provides the functionality needed to send commands to and receive data from one or more embedded systems. Prior to version 7.0.0-rc3, the Script Runner widget allows users to execute Python and Ruby scripts directly from the openc3-COSMOS-script-runner-api container. Because all the docker containers share a network, users can execute specially crafted scripts to bypass the API permissions check and per...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42088
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42220 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
Nginx UI is a web user interface for the Nginx web server. Prior to version 2.3.8, an authenticated user can call GET /api/settings and retrieve sensitive configuration values, including node.secret. The same node.secret is accepted by AuthRequired() through the X-Node-Secret header (or node_secret query parameter), causing the request to be treated as authenticated via the trusted-node path and associated with the i...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42220
 
💣 Precision Container Security with Docker and Black Duck
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The complexity of modern containerized applications often leaves developers drowning in a sea of "noise"—vulnerabilities that exist in the file system but pose zero actual risk to the application. The integration between Black Duck and Docker Hardened Images (DHI) provides a definitive answer to this challenge. By combining Docker’s secure-by-default foundations, using VEX (Vulnerability Exploitability eXchange)...
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/precision-container-security-with-docker-and-black-duck/
 
📰 Accelerate, Streamline, and Control Your Self-Service Private Cloud with VMware Cloud Foundation 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) has evolved significantly with each release. VCF 9.1 will build on the comprehensive capabilities established in VCF 9.0, delivering an enhanced consumption experience for a self-service private cloud with VCF. Based on a Broadcom customer survey conducted in March 2026 evaluating VCF 9, organizations using VCF Automation achieved two critical improvements: …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/05/accelerate-streamline-and-control-your-self-service-private-cloud-with-vcf-9-1/
 
📰 AI with VCF 9.1 on AMD GPUs: Build with open frameworks and simplify management, at a lower TCO
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly emerging as one of the most transformational technologies of our time, with massive potential to redefine how organizations operate, compete, and innovate. With the ability to learn from vast amounts of data, identify complex patterns, and make intelligent decisions, AI is moving enterprises towards smarter, faster, and highly adaptive operations …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/05/ai-with-vcf-9-1-on-amd-gpus-build-with-open-frameworks-and-simplify-management-at-a-lower-tco/
 
📰 Is your SIEM actually ready? A new way to find out
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: 9.4
Resumo:
SIEM Readiness is a new capability in Elastic Security, available in technical preview as of 9.4, that provides a centralized, continuously updated, and actionable view of your SIEM's operational health.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/siem-readiness
 
📰 Announcing VMware Cloud Foundation Edge 9.1: A Scalable, Autonomous Edge Platform
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Traditional infrastructure was never designed for edge scale. Managing hundreds to thousands of distributed sites with fragmented stacks, siloed tools, and manual processes creates operational risk, inconsistent security, and costly site-by-site management. For many organizations, this means logging into hundreds of sites to apply updates, troubleshooting inconsistent configurations, and relying on on-site IT slowing...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/05/announcing-vmware-cloud-foundation-edge-9-1-a-scalable-autonomous-edge-platform/
 
📰 Simplify Workload Connectivity and Enhance Network Scale and Performance with VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
In today’s fast-paced digital landscape, IT organizations are caught between two worlds: rapidly adopting and scaling modern infrastructure while maintaining visibility, security and control. VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) Networking evolved significantly in VCF 9.0 with a simpler network deployment model with VPCs, self-service access to network services, and strong integration across the VCF stack.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/05/simplify-workload-connectivity-and-enhance-network-scale-and-performance-with-vcf-9-1/
 
📰 VCF 9.1: The Secure, Cost-Effective Private Cloud Platform for Production AI
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/05/vcf-9-1-secure-cost-effective-private-cloud-platform-for-production-ai/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 MetInfo CMS CVE-2026-29014 Exploited for Remote Code Execution Attacks
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Threat actors are actively exploiting a critical security flaw impacting an open-source content management system (CMS) known as MetInfo, according to new findings from VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-29014 (CVSS score: 9.8), a code injection flaw that could result in arbitrary code execution. "MetInfo CMS versions 7.9, 8.0, and 8.1 contain an unauthenticated PHP code
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/metinfo-cms-cve-2026-29014-exploited.html
 
🚨 Weaver E-cology RCE Flaw CVE-2026-22679 Actively Exploited via Debug API
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
A critical security vulnerability in Weaver (Fanwei) E-cology, an enterprise office automation (OA) and collaboration platform, has come under active exploitation in the wild. The vulnerability (CVE-2026-22679, CVSS score: 9.8) relates to a case of unauthenticated remote code execution affecting Weaver E-cology 10.0 versions prior to 20260312. The issue resides in the "/papi/esearch/data/devops/
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/weaver-e-cology-rce-flaw-cve-2026-22679.html
 
💣 ⚡ Weekly Recap: AI-Powered Phishing, Android Spying Tool, Linux Exploit, GitHub RCE & More
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
This week, the shadows moved faster than the patches. While most teams were still triaging last month’s alerts, attackers had already turned control panels into kill switches, kernels into open doors, and open-source pipelines into silent delivery systems. The game has shifted from breach to occupation. They’re living inside SaaS sessions, pushing code with trusted commits, and scaling
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/weekly-recap-ai-powered-phishing.html
 
💣 Google now offers up to $1.5 million for some Android exploits
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: 1.5
Resumo:
Google overhauls its Android and Chrome vulnerability rewards programs, offering bounties of up to $1.5 million for the most difficult exploits while scaling back payouts for flaws that artificial intelligence (AI) has made easier to find.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/google-now-offers-up-to-15-million-for-some-android-exploits/
 
📰 The EOL Blind Spot in Your CVE Feed: What SCA Tools Don't Check.
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Critical vulnerabilities can exist in open source software your scanners don't check. HeroDevs reveals how EOL software creates blind spots in CVE feeds and SCA tools, and how you can receive a free end-of-life scan for your projects.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/the-eol-blind-spot-in-your-cve-feed-what-sca-tools-dont-check/
 
📰 ScarCruft hackers push BirdCall Android malware via game platform
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The North Korean hacker group APT37 has been delivering an Android version of a backdoor called BirdCall in a supply-chain attack through a video game platform.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/scarcruft-hackers-push-birdcall-android-malware-via-game-platform/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2025-13618 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Mentoring plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to privilege escalation in all versions up to, and including, 1.2.8. This is due to the plugin not properly restricting the roles that users can register with in the mentoring_process_registration() function. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to register with administrator-level user accounts.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-13618
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42151 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Prometheus is an open-source monitoring system and time series database. Prior to versions 3.5.3 and 3.11.3, the client_secret field in the Azure AD remote write OAuth configuration (storage/remote/azuread) was typed as string instead of Secret. Prometheus redacts fields of type Secret when serving the configuration via the /-/config HTTP API endpoint. Because the field was a plain string, the Azure OAuth client secr...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42151
 
🚨 Copy Fail no Ubuntu: como aplicar a mitigação da falha CVE-2026-31431 - Blog do Edivaldo
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-31431 associada a Ubuntu. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiVkFVX3lxTE1Eb0R3NVhOM2FNRjJDVnZYME1Ld0NranFWSF9NdG1IOV85WDJZY1NvUVotWjB4WnNicG9JUUlBUnZBQUk5elNmcWR6Yy1PMzlKS1JXclJR0gFeQVVfeXFMTmczVEpocUNCSWZ1NGxOWFFkVDhHMVF3Q09xLXN5NEgxbzJVZFlFMmRBOVpqengtMW1DdWZxZHBjdlZDdC10aEJpTTZSdE9yeWphSEk4bXVlQVJTMzQ5dw?oc=5
 
🚨 CVE-2026-5335 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Magic Export & Import WordPress plugin before 1.2.0 stores exported CSV files at a publicly accessible location, making it possible for any visitors to leak sensitive user information.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5335
 
📰 Microsoft Agent 365 entra em disponibilidade geral ampliando capacidades e integrações - Microsoft Source
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Azure, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 03/05/2026 até 05/05/2026.
